Class Neo4jVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<Neo4jVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.neo4j.Neo4jVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<Neo4jVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
Neo4jVectorStore
public static class Neo4jVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<Neo4jVectorStore.Builder>
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Gerrit Meier, Michael Simons, Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Soby Chacko, Jihoon Kim, chabinhwang

  • Method Details

    • databaseName

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder databaseName(String databaseName)
      Sets the database name. When provided and not blank, creates a session config for that database.
      Parameters:
      databaseName - the database name to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • sessionConfig

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder sessionConfig(org.neo4j.driver.SessionConfig sessionConfig)
      Sets the session configuration directly.
      Parameters:
      sessionConfig - the session configuration to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • embeddingDimension

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder embeddingDimension(int dimension)
      Sets the embedding dimension. Must be positive.
      Parameters:
      dimension - the dimension of the embedding
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dimension is less than 1

    • distanceType

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder distanceType(Neo4jVectorStore.Neo4jDistanceType distanceType)
      Sets the distance type for index storage and queries.
      Parameters:
      distanceType - the distance type to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if distanceType is null

    • label

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder label(String label)
      Sets the label for document nodes.
      Parameters:
      label - the label to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • embeddingProperty

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder embeddingProperty(String embeddingProperty)
      Sets the property name for storing embeddings.
      Parameters:
      embeddingProperty - the property name to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • indexName

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder indexName(String indexName)
      Sets the name of the vector index.
      Parameters:
      indexName - the index name to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • idProperty

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder idProperty(String idProperty)
      Sets the property name for document IDs.
      Parameters:
      idProperty - the property name to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • textProperty

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder textProperty(String textProperty)
      Sets the property name for text-content.
      Parameters:
      textProperty - the text property to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • constraintName

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder constraintName(String constraintName)
      Sets the name of the unique constraint.
      Parameters:
      constraintName - the constraint name to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • initializeSchema

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • filterExpressionConverter

      public Neo4jVectorStore.Builder filterExpressionConverter(FilterExpressionConverter filterExpressionConverter)
      Sets the FilterExpressionConverter to use when converting filter expressions to Neo4j Cypher queries. Defaults to Neo4jVectorFilterExpressionConverter.
      Parameters:
      filterExpressionConverter - the filter expression converter to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • build

      public Neo4jVectorStore build()
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Builds and returns a new VectorStore instance with the configured settings.
      Returns:
      a new VectorStore instance
